name: O.R.C. Larva
description: The O.R.C. Larva is a reprogrammed larva that patrols areas controlled by the O.R.C. network. It is still fast and aggressive, but now commits to fights more directly than the wild version.
behavior: It runs short O.R.C. patrol routes and almost always sprints once it detects a threat. It hides less than a normal larva and relies more on quickly closing distance.
interactionWithPlayer: It becomes hostile on sight and often tries to surround you with other O.R.C. larvae. The main rule is not to expose your back or let several attack at once.
interactionWithCreatures: It often accompanies O.R.C. waves and clashes with smaller creatures that cross its routes. Its role is to harass and finish targets already distracted by larger units.
strategy: A single one dies quickly, but several together are still dangerous. Block the combo, sidestep the charged bite, and focus the ones already on top of you first.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick opening attack used to keep you in close range.

abilities.name: Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several fast bites to punish late repositioning.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It pulls back slightly before lunging forward with more force.
